Name: -1_likes_friend_movies_art
Representative_Docs: ["My neighbor who holds the opinion that dangerous forms of media (such as metal music) directly lead to violence. This viewpoint is incredibly nonsensical because it doesn't even consider the possibility of someone enjoying one of those forms of media not conducting violence. This can easily be disproven by providing a single example.", 'My mother. Her decoration style is tacky and unappealing to me. She also likes older music and movies that aren’t what I would consider to be good or enjoyably.', "The one thing that I think this person has is poor taste in the movie genres he watches. He likes to watch Lifetime movies which usually involve men who aren't treating women well and he likes horror movies. He isn't some deviant person and is really nice actually, but I feel he has poor taste in movies. This is really a hard question to answer. The only other thing I can think of is his taste in food. He puts hot sauce on everything he eats and he also like eating moose heart and liver, which is gross."]

Name: 0_poor_music_know_shows

We don't like the same things, therefore my opinion of her likes and tastes are poor.", 'I think that my friend, Jimmy, has poor taste. His music tastes are poor, low quality songs that require no talent and I do not enjoy.']

Name: 1_clothes_dress_clothing_way
Representative_Docs: ["I have a sister in law who just doesn't have good taste at all. The way she dresses had not a bit of style to it. She mainly just puts her clothes on and goes and they don't flatter her at all. She doesn't try to decorate her home up and put nice touches to it.", 'I have a friend that would wear some revealing clothing when she goes out.  Everyone will be staring at her because of that.  Her clothing draws attention to her not in a good way.  What she chose to wear was in poor taste because of that.', "This person dresses in baggy clothes and has a poor taste wear the clothes are not fitted and the fashion is outdated and the clothes don't match well with the shoes and colors."]

Name: 2_lack_time_behaviour_changes
Representative_Docs: ['Filmmaker JJ Abrams creates transitory, highly derivative work. It frequently displays a lack of coherence or logical narrative flow, and diminishes in value the longer it is scrutinized.', 'This person has lots of money and changes their look and style frequently.  Their hairstyle changes all the time, their rugs are always different when I visit and it just seems as though they are chasing a “look@ but never actually “ nailing” it. Lots of money spent.  This person has spinning rims on their car in high school...one of them didn’t spin and they were the butt of many jokes.', 'Someone like a sports figure.  They have the mind of a child and act impulsively as well as exhibit a lack of reason.  Consequently they are often seen doing lousy behaviour like drinking, drugging, and fighting in public.  Not to mention they often have gaudy possessions to try to show off how rich they are but look annoying and of course of poor taste.']
